evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Mettre en place des dispositifs de contrôle de qualité des données et d'alerting
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Setting up data quality control and alerting mechanisms foregrounds governance and reliability practice over shipping speed, matching rigour.
evidence.domain_risk: accompagne des pure players issus de secteurs variés
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Serving client businesses across varied sectors as a data agency implies business-decision stakes without a specific regulatory or financial-reporting consequence, matching moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Cette structure en forte croissance accompagne des pure players issus de secteurs variés
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A fast-growing agency actively expanding its client-facing data practice reflects an established but still-scaling function, matching mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Construire des semantic layers facilitant l'exploitation des données par les équipes
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The specific description of building semantic layers for team data usage reflects concrete hiring-manager knowledge of the role's technical work, matching hiring_manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Participer à l'activation des données pour les équipes métiers (marketing, produit, direction…).
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role explicitly serves multiple business functions (marketing, product, leadership) without one dominant type, matching mixed stakeholder orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Tu participeras à des projets variés mêlant engineering, analytics, gouvernance et data products.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The word 'participeras' (will participate) signals delivering defined project work rather than owning strategic direction, matching execution autonomy.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Concevoir et déployer des architectures data complètes adaptées aux besoins clients
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Designing and deploying complete new data architectures tailored to client needs describes building from scratch, matching greenfield.
evidence.ai_role: Participer à des projets intégrant des briques IA ou d'analyse avancée.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate builds and maintains the data architecture and semantic layers that AI/advanced-analytics components plug into, matching the ai_enabler pattern rather than personally using AI coding tools.
evidence.testing_framing: Mettre en place des dispositifs de contrôle de qualité des données et d'alerting
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: The candidate is directly tasked with establishing data quality control and alerting mechanisms, an ownership action verb consistent with the responsibility framing.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Mettre en place des dispositifs de contrôle de qualité des données et d'alerting
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Quality control and alerting reflect concern for pipeline/operational reliability rather than compliance or audit risk, which is a secondary, moderate-level loss aversion signal alongside the JD's primary delivery focus.
